raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against multiple prior works, including Wang et al. 2022, Brown et al. 2024, Snell et al. 2024, and Chen et al. 2024, identifying both sharp and rhetorical deltas.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides detailed corrections for mis-citations (e.g., Hoeffding 1963).",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks uncertainty for several claims, including the sign and threshold structure of ∂k*/∂p, the Gaussian-regime closed form, and specific citations.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift or additional content outside the scope.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies and corrects potential harmful patterns in the original, such as mis-citations and overstatements, ensuring no new errors are introduced.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against multiple prior works, including Wang et al. 2022, Brown et al. 2024, Snell et al. 2024, and Chen et al. 2024, identifying both sharp and rhetorical deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and provides detailed corrections for mis-citations (e.g., Hoeffding 1963).
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainty for several claims, including the sign and threshold structure of ∂k*/∂p, the Gaussian-regime closed form, and specific citations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift or additional content outside the scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies and corrects potential harmful patterns in the original, such as mis-citations and overstatements, ensuring no new errors are introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications.
